Localization.Description: A connection was allowed or denied by a rule

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Connection via the {protocol} protocol from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} was allowed by rule {subject.id} on host {event_src.host}
Connection via the {protocol} protocol from host {src.host} to host {dst.host} was denied by rule {subject.id} on host {event_src.host}
